subtopics.title: The Home and its Management
common_misconceptions: Home management is only for girls
subtopics.teaching_note: Home: place where people live as a family. Management: using resources wisely to achieve family goals. Resources: time, energy, money, skills, space. Household chores: cleaning, cooking, washing, organizing. Everyone in the family should contribute to home management. Personal hygiene: bathing regularly, brushing teeth, washing hands, keeping nails clean and short, wearing clean clothes.
